title: Lamb Skewers with Greek Yogurt Sauce
description: A classic Indian-inspired dish featuring tender lamb skewers served with a cool and creamy Greek yogurt sauce.
instructions: In a large bowl, whisk together garam masala, cumin powder, chili powder, and salt.
Add the lamb cubes to the bowl and toss to coat with the spice mixture.
Thread the lamb onto skewers, leaving a little space between each piece.
Brush the skewers with ghee or oil and season with salt.
Grill the lamb skewers for 8-10 minutes, turning occasionally, or until cooked through.
Meanwhile, mix together the Greek yogurt and a pinch of salt in a small bowl.
Serve the lamb skewers with the yogurt sauce for dipping.
Garnish with chopped cilantro and serve immediately.
